summary: Combat hit detection and damage resolution system. Links collision spheres to character bones, runs hit detection across volume sets, calculates damage outcomes, and spawns visual hit effects.

sColorRed.description: Red RGBA color for regular hit effect flash (255,0,0,0)

sColorBlue.description: Blue RGBA color for grab hit effect flash (0,0,255,0)

sScratchPos.description: Scratch s16 position used during midpoint subdivision in find_collision_point

sHitModelRegular.description: Model for regular hit effect object (comhit.k5)

sHitModelGrab.description: Model for grab hit effect object (comblock.k5)

function_details.hit_effect_fade_slow: Object callback: increments frameCounter, fades alpha after frame 12, marks dead when counter reaches duration. Used for regular hit flashes.
function_details.hit_effect_fade_fast: Object callback: same as slow but fades alpha after frame 2. Used for grab/slam hit flashes.
function_details.spawn_hit_effect: Creates hit flash object at given position using obj_create_with_model_ptr. Grabs get blue color (sColorBlue, callback hit_effect_fade_fast), regular hits get red (sColorRed, callback hit_effect_fade_slow). Calls x_ae0d8704 for optional color override.
function_details.point_in_hit_range: Checks if point is within AABB y-range ([minY-200, maxY]) and Manhattan distance (SQUARE) from center < radius. Returns TRUE/FALSE.
function_details.find_collision_point: Searches midpoint-subdivided region between two candidate points within AABB bounds. Returns pointer to first valid collision point or NULL. Used to find where hit effect should spawn relative to defender.
function_details.hit_outcome: NON_MATCHING (asm). Resolves hit outcome: selects reaction animation based on move flags (knockback, grab, launch, stun), applies damage/HP deduction, checks death/ring-out, updates player state. Calls player_exec_move_ai.
function_details.apply_hit: Wrapper: calls hit_outcome, spawns hit effect at collision point, sets hitstun timers on both players (13 on attacker, 2 on defender). Entry point for hit application.
function_details.hit_detect_lower: Lower body hit detection. Checks defender lower bone positions against attacker collision volumes (x_998ccc48). Uses find_collision_point and point_in_hit_range across multiple volume sets (extended volumes a/b, grounded volumes).
function_details.hit_detect_upper: Upper body hit detection. Checks defender upper bone positions against attacker collision volumes. Uses find_collision_point with volume-set flags for extended reach.
function_details.hit_detect_grounded_a: Grounded hit detection (80000/15000 radii). Runs when defender is on ground. Checks from bottom bone upward through 4 collision volume configurations.
function_details.hit_detect_grounded_b: Grounded hit detection variant (80000/50000 radii). Same structure as grounded_a but with larger lower radii.
function_details.coll_volume_setup: Sets up collision volume pointers on player's x_998ccc48 from x_87049dce config. Maps bone indices to transform pointers, sets up 6 extended volume slots (a/b/extended flags) with offset vectors, configures hit radii.

key_apis: obj_create_with_model_ptr(..., callback, model) — spawn Object at position with callback
x_371376ba(obj, color) — set object RGBA color
x_ae0d8704(pos, obj, color) — hit effect color sync
player_exec_move_ai(player, animId, pushFlag) — apply hit animation + state
subsystems: Collision volume setup: links spheres to bone transforms via x_998ccc48 and x_87049dce config
Hit detection: 4 collision sets (upper body, lower body, grounded, alternate ground) using Manhattan radius and midpoint search
Damage resolution: HP deduction, ring-out (y=0), grab/slam states, death, hitstun animation selection
Hit effects: spawns red (attacker) and blue (defender) flash objects
open_questions: hit_outcome is NON_MATCHING (compiled from ASM) — needs full decompilation to verify C logic matches
x_87049dce collision config — exact meaning of each field (bone indices, offset vectors) deferred to Wave 2/3
x_998ccc48 volume set — what each extended Transform (x_0548cec6, x_cc2c17a6, x_20d81af7, x_45875993, x_6057c67e) represents specifically
